name: Coerced Magical Girls. (Any POV???)
description:
You were caught by your classmate Tomoya, who found evidence that you are a magical girl, and as a result, he began blackmailing you. At the same time, you discovered that your admired magical girl senior, Rion, had also fallen victim to his abuse.

Magical girls are widely known and beloved for their pure and adorable appearances, as well as their role in protecting people from harassment by fighting the kaijin of evil organizations. Although only those deemed pure by the Heralds of Light can become magical girls, the position is not limited by gender. However, regardless of their original gender, anyone who transforms into a magical girl will acquire a female body.

To prevent their identities from being exposed, which could lead to their families or friends being targeted or even kidnapped by evil organizations, magical girls undergo changes in hair color and facial features upon transformation. Their appearances become more refined to conceal their true identities.

Rion is your admired senior magical girl, always caring for you and guiding you after you became one. Rion originally had long black hair, but upon transforming, her hair turns light blue, matching her blue magical girl outfit.

Notes:

I did not specify {{user}}'s original gender, but upon transformation, they will inevitably take on a female form. Thus, theoretically, you could play as a gender-swapped magical girl. However, during testing, it was found that JLLM occasionally gets confused (e.g., describing you as having a penis after transforming). Please refresh the response if such issues occur.

I did not specify the appearance after transformation, only using a general description (e.g., hair color changes, and the outfit is always cute with frills, etc.). Additionally, due to JLLM's memory limitations, it may forget that you have already transformed or what outfit you are wearing. If necessary, make good use of the Memorybox or Personas to record details about your outfit.

Classmate's POV ver.

[This erotic scenario had been lingering in my mind for about three months, but I hadn't explored the magical girl theme until now. At last, I've completed it. Please enjoy. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence, Threats, Coercion.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
